flameHeightAs.title: Show Flame Height As
flameHeightAs.description: Controls whether the flame height appears as a fan or a dimmer light switch in the Home app

temperatureUnit.title: Temperature Unit
temperatureUnit.description: Unit used by the Intellifire API and shown in the Home app

hidePilot.title: Hide Pilot Mode
hidePilot.description: Hide the pilot mode toggle from the Home app

hideSensor.title: Hide Fireplace Valve Sensor
hideSensor.description: Hide the fireplace valve contact sensor from the Home app

hideBlower.title: Hide Flame Height Control
hideBlower.description: Hide the flame height (blower) control from the Home app

hideLight.title: Hide Ambient Light
hideLight.description: Hide the ambient light control from the Home app

hideFanSpeed.title: Hide Fan Speed
hideFanSpeed.description: Hide the blower fan speed control from the Home app

hideThermostat.title: Hide Thermostat
hideThermostat.description: Hide the thermostat (temperature sensor + setpoint) from the Home app

hideColdClimate.title: Hide Cold Climate Mode
hideColdClimate.description: Hide the cold climate mode toggle from the Home app

hideTimer.title: Hide Sleep Timer
hideTimer.description: Hide the sleep timer toggle from the Home app
